provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Importation without Licence (Specified Items) Notice.

With effect from the first day of July, 1984, the goods specified in the Schedule to this Notice, designated as specified items for the purposes of the Notice, and originating from any country, are hereby permitted to be imported without an import licence. Schedule (i) Cooking oils. (ii) Soap. (iii) Toothpaste.
